# SoupyTag

> SoupyTag is a mobile-first web app for tagging defects in photos. Snap a picture, let AI outline the problem area, and describe what's wrong with your voice — no account required.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Capture a photo, tap or draw to outline a defect, and add voice-described tags.
- [WrapKit Cloud](/wrapkit): Turn any website into a publishable Android app — order page and pricing.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How SoupyTag handles photos, voice notes, and AI tagging data.
